faqs.question: What services does your company offer?
faqs.answer: NewYork Hvac Solutions provides professional generic services to residential and commercial clients in New York and the surrounding NY area. Contact us to learn about the full range of solutions we offer.

faqs.question: Do you serve both homes and businesses?
faqs.answer: Yes, we work with homeowners, property managers, and business owners throughout the region. Whether your project is large or small, our experienced team has the skills and equipment to deliver outstanding results.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: NewYork Hvac Solutions proudly serves New York and surrounding communities across NY. If you're unsure whether we cover your location, give us a call at (888) 311-8609 and we'll be happy to confirm.

faqs.question: How do I get a quote for your services?
faqs.answer: Getting a quote is simple. Call us at (888) 311-8609 or fill out the contact form on our website with details about your project. We'll review your request and provide a clear, detailed estimate — typically within one business day.

faqs.question: Do you offer free estimates?
faqs.answer: Yes, NewYork Hvac Solutions offers free, no-obligation estimates for most projects. We believe in transparent pricing, and you'll always know the full cost before any work begins.

faqs.question: What payment methods do you accept?
faqs.answer: We accept cash, checks, and all major credit cards. For larger projects, financing options may be available. Our team will discuss payment details with you at the time of your estimate.

faqs.question: How do I schedule an appointment?
faqs.answer: You can schedule an appointment by calling (888) 311-8609, using our online booking form, or sending us an email. We offer flexible scheduling to accommodate your availability and will confirm your appointment promptly.

faqs.question: How far in advance should I book?
faqs.answer: We recommend scheduling at least a few days in advance, though we often have same-week availability. During busy seasons, booking a week or two ahead ensures you get your preferred time slot.

faqs.question: Do you offer emergency or same-day service?
faqs.answer: NewYork Hvac Solutions understands that some situations require immediate attention. We offer priority and emergency service options for urgent needs. Call us at (888) 311-8609 and we'll do our best to help you as quickly as possible.

faqs.question: Are you licensed and insured?
faqs.answer: Yes, NewYork Hvac Solutions is fully licensed, bonded, and insured in NY. We maintain all required credentials and carry comprehensive liability coverage to protect our clients and their property.

faqs.question: Do you offer a warranty or guarantee on your work?
faqs.answer: We stand behind the quality of our work with a satisfaction guarantee. If you're not completely happy with the results, let us know and we'll make it right. Specific warranty terms vary by project and are provided in writing with every estimate.

faqs.question: How long have you been in business?
faqs.answer: NewYork Hvac Solutions has been proudly serving the New York community for years, building a reputation for reliability, quality workmanship, and exceptional customer service. We'd love the opportunity to show you why our clients keep coming back.
